mapper.select: SELECT rp.plan_id AS planId, rp.application_id AS applicationId, rp.total_amount AS totalAmount, rp.total_principal AS totalPrincipal, rp.total_interest AS totalInterest, rp.repayment_type AS repaymentType, CASE rp.repayment_type WHEN 'equal_principal_interest' THEN '等额本息' WHEN 'equal_principal' THEN '等额本金' ELSE '未知方式' END AS repaymentTypeDesc, rp.term_count AS termCount, rp.create_time AS createTime FROM repayment_plan rp WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC

SELECT rp.plan_id AS planId, rp.application_id AS applicationId, rp.user_id AS userId, rp.total_amount AS totalAmount, rp.total_principal AS totalPrincipal, rp.total_interest AS totalInterest, rp.repayment_type AS repaymentType, CASE rp.repayment_type WHEN 'equal_principal_interest' THEN '等额本息' WHEN 'equal_principal' THEN '等额本金' ELSE '未知方式' END AS repaymentTypeDesc, rp.term_count AS termCount, rp.create_time AS createTime FROM repayment_plan rp WHERE rp.application_id = #{applicationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT rp.plan_id AS planId, rp.application_id AS applicationId, rp.user_id AS userId, su.real_name AS userName, su.phone AS userPhone, rp.total_amount AS totalAmount, rp.total_principal AS totalPrincipal, rp.total_interest AS totalInterest, rp.repayment_type AS repaymentType, CASE rp.repayment_type WHEN 'equal_principal_interest' THEN '等额本息' WHEN 'equal_principal' THEN '等额本金' ELSE '未知方式' END AS repaymentTypeDesc, rp.term_count AS termCount, rp.create_time AS createTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monthly_repayment mr WHERE mr.plan_id = rp.plan_id AND mr.repayment_status = 'overdue') AS overdueCount FROM repayment_plan rp LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON rp.user_id = su.user_id ORDER BY rp.create_time DESC
